rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the writing by tightening prose and reducing repetition, indicating a high level of polish but not a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively disclosed uncertainties, such as statistical significance and method details, aligning with the highest anchor.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without any drift, fully addressing all specified areas.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and potential issues in the original text were identified, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: While some changes were traced, major rewrites lacked detailed annotations, falling short of the highest standard.
